regardless of the block timestamp at which the update was made."},"testFuzz_ScoreAlwaysInRange(uint16)":{"notice":"Fuzz alias using the standard Foundry naming convention so both         `fuzz_` and `testFuzz_` prefixes are covered."},"testFuzz_UpdateScoreStoresCorrectly(uint16)":{"notice":"Fuzz that updateScore stores whatever score the oracle provides         and getScore returns consistent tier values."},"test_FirstUpdate_NoCooldown()":{"notice":"The very first update on a freshly minted token must not be         gated by the cooldown (lastUpdated is 0)."},"test_GetTokenId_AfterMint()":{"notice":"getTokenId returns the correct ID after mint."},"test_GetTokenId_NoToken()":{"notice":"getTokenId returns 0 for wallets without a token."},"test_MintScore()":{"notice":"The oracle can mint a score NFT to a user; the token ID is stored         and getScore returns a sensible initial state."},"test_MintScore_MultipleUsers()":{"notice":"Minting to distinct wallets produces distinct, monotonically         increasing token IDs."},"test_MintScore_RevertIfAlreadyMinted()":{"notice":"A second mint for the same wallet must revert."},"test_OnlyOracle_CanMint()":{"notice":"A non-oracle address must not be able to call mintScore."},"test_OnlyOracle_CanUpdate()":{"notice":"A non-oracle address must not be able to call updateScore."},"test_OnlyOracle_OwnerCannotMint()":{"notice":"Owner must not be able to mint \u2014 only the oracle address can."},"test_SetOracle_NonOwnerReverts()":{"notice":"A non-owner must not be able to call setOracle."},"test_SetOracle_Owner()":{"notice":"The owner can rotate the oracle address."},"test_SoulBound_CannotSafeTransfer()":{"notice":"safeTransferFrom (3-arg) must always revert with SoulBoundToken."},"test_SoulBound_CannotSafeTransfer_WithData()":{"notice":"safeTransferFrom (4-arg, with data) must also revert."},"test_SoulBound_CannotTransfer()":{"notice":"transferFrom must always revert with SoulBoundToken."},"test_SoulBound_CannotTransfer_Operator()":{"notice":"transferFrom also reverts when called by an approved operator."},"test_TierDerivation()":{"notice":"getTier must return the correct tier for boundary and interior         values at every tier boundary."},"test_TierDerivation_ViaGetScore()":{"notice":"getScore returns a tier consistent with getTier at all points."},"test_TokenURI_NonEmpty()":{"notice":"tokenURI should return a non-empty base64-encoded JSON string."},"test_TokenURI_NonExistentReverts()":{"notice":"tokenURI on a non-existent token should revert."},"test_UpdateScore_AfterCooldown()":{"notice":"After waiting 25 hours the oracle can successfully update again."},"test_UpdateScore_Cooldown()":{"notice":"Updating a score twice without waiting for the 24-hour cooldown         must revert with CooldownNotExpired."},"test_UpdateScore_Cooldown_OneSecondShort()":{"notice":"The cooldown is measured from lastUpdated; a partial warp that         is one second short of expiry must still revert."},"test_UpdateScore_EmitsEvent()":{"notice":"updateScore must emit ScoreUpdated with the correct parameters."},"test_UpdateScore_ExactlyAtCooldownBoundary()":{"notice":"Exactly at the cooldown boundary (24 h) the update should succeed."}},"notice":"Comprehensive Foundry tests for CreditScoreNFT covering soul-bound         enforcement, cooldown logic, tier derivation, access control and         fuzz returns.excludedArtifacts_: The list of excluded artifact identifiers.

returns.excludedContracts_: The list of excluded contract addresses.

returns.excludedSelectors_: The list of excluded selector configurations.

returns.excludedSenders_: The list of excluded sender addresses.

returns._0: True if any assertion has failed, false otherwise.

returns.targetedArtifactSelectors_: The list of targeted artifact-selector configurations.

returns.targetedArtifacts_: The list of targeted artifact identifiers.

returns.targetedContracts_: The list of targeted contract addresses.

returns.targetedInterfaces_: The list of targeted address-interface configurations.

returns.targetedSelectors_: The list of targeted selector configurations.

returns.targetedSenders_: The list of targeted sender addresses.

failed().notice: Returns true if any test assertion has failed.

fuzz_ScoreAlwaysInRange(uint16).notice: getTier must never revert, regardless of the score value, and         must always return a value in [0, 3].

targetSenders().notice: Returns sender allowlist configured via `targetSender` (empty means no sender allowlist).

testFuzz_CooldownWindow(uint32).notice: Fuzz that the cooldown window is always exactly UPDATE_COOLDOWN         regardless of the block timestamp at which the update was made.

testFuzz_ScoreAlwaysInRange(uint16).notice: Fuzz alias using the standard Foundry naming convention so both         `fuzz_` and `testFuzz_` prefixes are covered.

testFuzz_UpdateScoreStoresCorrectly(uint.notice: Fuzz that updateScore stores whatever score the oracle provides         and getScore returns consistent tier values.

test_FirstUpdate_NoCooldown().notice: The very first update on a freshly minted token must not be         gated by the cooldown (lastUpdated is 0).

test_GetTokenId_AfterMint().notice: getTokenId returns the correct ID after mint.

test_GetTokenId_NoToken().notice: getTokenId returns 0 for wallets without a token.

test_MintScore().notice: The oracle can mint a score NFT to a user; the token ID is stored         and getScore returns a sensible initial state.

test_MintScore_MultipleUsers().notice: Minting to distinct wallets produces distinct, monotonically         increasing token IDs.

test_MintScore_RevertIfAlreadyMinted().notice: A second mint for the same wallet must revert.

test_OnlyOracle_CanMint().notice: A non-oracle address must not be able to call mintScore.

test_OnlyOracle_CanUpdate().notice: A non-oracle address must not be able to call updateScore.

test_OnlyOracle_OwnerCannotMint().notice: Owner must not be able to mint — only the oracle address can.

test_SetOracle_NonOwnerReverts().notice: A non-owner must not be able to call setOracle.

test_SetOracle_Owner().notice: The owner can rotate the oracle address.

test_SoulBound_CannotSafeTransfer().notice: safeTransferFrom (3-arg) must always revert with SoulBoundToken.

test_SoulBound_CannotSafeTransfer_WithDa.notice: safeTransferFrom (4-arg, with data) must also revert.

test_SoulBound_CannotTransfer().notice: transferFrom must always revert with SoulBoundToken.

test_SoulBound_CannotTransfer_Operator().notice: transferFrom also reverts when called by an approved operator.

test_TierDerivation().notice: getTier must return the correct tier for boundary and interior         values at every tier boundary.

test_TierDerivation_ViaGetScore().notice: getScore returns a tier consistent with getTier at all points.

test_TokenURI_NonEmpty().notice: tokenURI should return a non-empty base64-encoded JSON string.

test_TokenURI_NonExistentReverts().notice: tokenURI on a non-existent token should revert.

test_UpdateScore_AfterCooldown().notice: After waiting 25 hours the oracle can successfully update again.

test_UpdateScore_Cooldown().notice: Updating a score twice without waiting for the 24-hour cooldown         must revert with CooldownNotExpired.

test_UpdateScore_Cooldown_OneSecondShort.notice: The cooldown is measured from lastUpdated; a partial warp that         is one second short of expiry must still revert.

test_UpdateScore_EmitsEvent().notice: updateScore must emit ScoreUpdated with the correct parameters.

test_UpdateScore_ExactlyAtCooldownBounda.notice: Exactly at the cooldown boundary (24 h) the update should succeed.
